asset.title: Two Client Live Sync
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough effectively demonstrates real-time synchronization between two clients and an active server-led agent updating shared spreadsheet data.

featureClarity.evidence: The split-screen layout clearly shows Client A and Client B updating in sync.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the full sequence from message input to instant sync and agent cell-locking.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode UI with clear step indicators, though the zoom transition is a bit sudden.

consistency.evidence: Aligns perfectly with the NodeRoom concept of collaborative spreadsheets and agents.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captures actual UI interactions and live state changes directly.

legibility.evidence: Split-screen text is small, but the zoom-in steps help maintain readability.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for collaborative financial modeling and automated agent workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the latency and step-by-step execution of the agent.

observedEvidence: Two-client split screen showing real-time message delivery
Server-led agent locking cells and updating variance values live

defects.observed: The transition zooming into the spreadsheet is quite abrupt.
defects.fix: Add a slight ease-in-out transition to the zoom effect to make it smoother.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's live sync in action as Client A and Client B stay perfectly aligned while a server-led agent updates financial cells in real time.
